ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code (IATA) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code (IATA) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Typical flight duration of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight belongs to */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Return date of the flight */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the flight */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available on the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, airline staff, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment was made for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the price history belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the flight at the time of the entry */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., fuel surcharge, taxes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price change, flight status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was cancelled */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancellation the refund was made for */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_cancellation_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancellation_id") REFERENCES cancellations ("cancellation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline the staff member belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the staff member account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., administrator, customer support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the schedule belongs to */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight operates (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_class" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Economy, Premium Economy) */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the class */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_class_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., meal, extra legroom) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)
